title: The Silver Slave
writer: Anthony Coldeway, Peter Milne, Howard Smith
actors: Irene Rich, Audrey Ferris, Holmes Herbert
plot: Bernice Randall, who has forsaken the love of her sweetheart, Tom Richards, to marry for wealth, turns down Richards' proposal after the death of her husband, and she is denounced by him as a slave to silver. Lavishing the greater...
